title: ExtraNature
body:
## The mod aims to update the biomes that Mojang didn't update yet

### Updated biomes include:
- Forest
- Beach

Features in the **forest**:
- Blackberry Bushes
- Maple trees
- Foxes
- Fallen Leaves on the ground
- Morchella below trees

Features in the **beach**:
  - Palm trees
  - Crabs
  - Coconuts from Wandering Traders
  - Seashells from fishing
